form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.08) when fourth over 520m at this track in a Grade 3/4. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.16) over 520m at Nowra. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 9 lengths behind Cumbria Jack over 520m. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior clocked a brilliant 29.51 over 520m finishing second at this track. Looks an each way chance again here.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 520m in 29.56 last start, beating Flash Ethics. This appears within his reach.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 520m at this track, beaten 6 lengths (30.03) behind Texas Bandit in a NG on March 28. Prepared to risk.
